sub_mechanisms: M_1: K-motif vocabulary V_kashub 7 attention-head primitives canonical winding numbers w=(1,2,3,1,2,3,1)
M_2: spiral-rotation signature W_winding per-head winding-number topological invariant
M_3: per-region motif-specialization R_region layer×position pinned motif-head pair
M_4: density-grade ladder L_dec coarse-to-fine motif-density schedule
M_5: topological-knot integrity tau_integrity per-head winding deviation detector + projection repair

results.name: TOHA Topological Divergence Attention
results.rationale: Topological divergence on attention graphs for hallucination detection; no 7-motif Kaszubian vocabulary, no winding-number signature, no region-pinned motif heads, no density ladder, no canonical-winding repair.

hit_threshold.rule: hit iff completeness_score >= 0.7; total_hits == 0 -> PASS, total_hits >= 1 -> FAIL (v5/v6 convention)

decision_rationale: None of 8 retrieved papers cover the K=5 distinctive sub-mechanisms (Kaszubian 7-motif vocabulary + per-head winding-number signature + region-pinned motif-head specialization + coarse-to-fine density-grade ladder + topological-knot integrity repair). Max completeness 0.20 (TDA-NLP-Survey). Per-paper-completeness yields total_hits=0 → PASS under v6 rubric. Note: agent returned 'FAIL' string but its rationale ('total_hits=0; no paper reaches 0.7') corresponds to v5/v6 PASS (no prior art found = novel). Normalized verdict: PASS. Primary v6 verdict (also PASS) ALIGNS with verifier v6 verdict — Pattern E MITIGATED.
